{"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"Communicating your diversity and inclusion (D&I) goals and progress to stakeholders is crucial for transparency, accountability, and building trust.","distilled_fact":"Communicating diversity and inclusion (D&I) goals and progress to stakeholders is crucial for transparency, accountability, and building trust."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"Develop a clear D&I statement: Craft a concise, meaningful statement that outlines your organization's commitment to diversity and inclusion. This statement should be prominent on your website, intranet, and other internal and external platforms.","distilled_fact":"A concise, meaningful D&I statement that outlines an organization's commitment to diversity and inclusion should be prominent on the organization's website, intranet, and other internal and external platforms."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"Create a dedicated D&I webpage: Design a webpage that showcases your D&I goals, progress, and initiatives. 	* Blog posts or articles
	* Intranet or employee portal
	* Annual reports or sustainability reports
	* Investor relations materials","distilled_fact":"D&I efforts should be communicated through company-wide emails or newsletters, social media platforms such as Twitter, LinkedIn, and Facebook, blog
